Re-run automated verification to confirm row-level citations, formulas (or numeric intermediate columns), +/-5% sensitivity flags, and remediation budget checks are present and correct.

planned_changes: Ensure gating_change_log.md is created in artifacts/ and included in produced_deliverable_items and actual_outputs.json. The log must include mapping from packet rows to workbook rows, assumptions, normalization details, and per-record citations.
Add or attach a machine-readable actual_outputs.json into the artifact bundle if not present. Confirm its produced_deliverable_items matches the artifact previews.

Make the workbook verifiable by either: (a) regenerating a standard XLSX using openpyxl so platform preview/parsers can open it, or (b) including CSV/ODS exports of all calculation sheets and a 'Calculations' sheet containing plain numeric intermediate values and explicit formula text and row pointers.
Add explicit per-record +/-5% sensitivity calculations and a Boolean expert-review flag column derived from the sensitivity rule; include these columns in both the workbook and CSV exports.

Add remediation combination tables with per-combo cost calculations, link each remediation entry to remediation_budget_usd, and include row-level citations showing which packet rows drive feasibility decisions. Provide a summary Decision_Summary sheet with clear references to row IDs.
Update final_message.txt/stdout to reflect the actual bundled files (no claims of files not attached).

Re-run deterministic precheck and the model grader. Collect and attach stdout/stderr, final_message.txt, and the artifact_content_previews so verifier can confirm consistency and that ri_1 criteria are met.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The attempt produced the required XLSX artifact but the grader flagged semantic noncompliance because the gating_change_log.md was not present in the artifact previews/produced_deliverable_items and the workbook could not be programmatically inspected (openpyxl not available). Deterministic precheck passed artifact presence, but model-level grading failed due to unverifiable formulas, missing companion log, and manifest inconsistencies (stdout/final_message claim gating_change_log.md created but artifact previews do not include it). Resolve artifact packaging and verifiability issues and re-run precheck/grader.
